specific_question: In May 2025, did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn conduct a risk-scoring analysis on the legacy authentication modules used within the MediConn virtual healthcare platform?
answer: Yes. Between May 1 and May 31, 2025, the cybersecurity specialist completed a risk-scoring assessment on outdated authentication modules within MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform to evaluate potential exploit paths, according to an internal cybersecurity report.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
